meaning: adj.有微风的,通风好的,活泼的,轻松愉快的
examples: It was a bright, breezy day.
You're very bright and breezy today!
Turn yourself into a breezy goddess by opting for the braided, crochet or beaded headband models.
Breezy waterfront resorts and sleek live-aboard dive vessels host travelling scuba enthusiasts and sunburnt Australians on holiday.
When recording video, the camera includes wind reduction technology to help capture clear audio even in breezy conditions.
